scripts.start: bun run src/lib/migrate.ts && bun run apps/core/src/index.ts
scripts.test:release: bash -n scripts/release/*.sh && bun test test/release-common.test.ts test/release-enterprise-scripts.test.ts test/release-alertmanager-scripts.test.ts test/release-runtime-integrations.test.ts test/release-agentledger-scripts.test.ts test/release-compat-scripts.test.ts test/monitoring-agentledger-alert-rules.test.ts
scripts.test:release:compat: bash -n scripts/release/check_oauth_alert_compat.sh scripts/release/canary_gate.sh scripts/release/preflight_release_window_oauth_alerts.sh scripts/release/release_window_oauth_alerts.sh && bun test test/release-compat-scripts.test.ts test/release-enterprise-scripts.test.ts test/release-alertmanager-scripts.test.ts
scripts.test:release:full: bun run test:release && bun test test/oauth-alert-compat-guard.test.ts test/release-package-scripts.test.ts
